channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Proposed Iran-U.S. deal would reopen Hormuz strait and lift oil sanctions, Iran state media says
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said Thursday that the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened as soon as a deal is signed.

item.title: SpaceX’s Gwynne Shotwell had IPO doubts for years, now she has a message for investors
item.description: Gwynne Shotwell, long Elon Musk's second-in-command at SpaceX, spoke exclusively with CNBC ahead of her company's highly anticipated IPO.

item.title: For Warsh as Fed chair, silence may be the point
item.description: Kevin Warsh will hold his first Fed meeting, giving markets the first public look at how he'll communicate as chair of the Federal Reserve.

item.title: SpaceX IPO live updates: Everything you need to know about the SPCX record debut
item.description: Follow SpaceX IPO live updates on price, ticker, broker access, valuation and what investors need to know before shares trade.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Adobe, Rocket Lab, AMD, Carnival & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves before the bell.

item.title: Buy AMD shares as graphics chip sales boost earnings, says Citi
item.description: The bank thinks Advanced Micro Devices is set to see an improving AI outlook, with both a stronger GPU business and increasing demand for CPUs.

item.title: Pirro's losses in Fed investigation should stay on the books, judge rules
item.description: In a scathing ruling, Judge James Boasberg denied U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro's request to vacate his earlier orders.

item.title: Meta reportedly begins dismantling $2 billion Manus deal on Beijing's orders
item.description: Meta has reportedly begun dismantling its acquisition of Manus, moving to comply with Beijing's unprecedented order to hand back the Chinese-founded AI startup.

item.title: Ex-Andreessen Horowitz partner slams his old firm, other VCs for 'political infiltration' around AI
item.description: John O'Farrell, former partner at Andreessen Horowitz, says the PAC Leading the Future, backed by his old firm, is trying to "intimidate politicians."

item.title: ChatGPT hits a billion monthly app users despite souring public AI sentiment
item.description: ChatGPT reached a billion monthly users in May despite growing unease over its ethical and environmental impacts.

item.title: Melania Trump announces a new savings account for youth in foster care
item.description: A new savings program for children in foster care was announced Thursday at an event with the first lady and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.

item.title: Waymo launches premier subscription tier for $29.99 a month, starting in select cities
item.description: Waymo is offering a new subscription tier for power users, starting in San Francisco, Los Angeles and Phoenix

item.title: Warren questions SpaceX IPO oversight in new letter to stock indexes
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren seeking answers on changes to index provider waiting periods, protections for retail investors, in a letter obtained first by CNBC.

item.title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards
item.description: With SpaceX seeking an IPO valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion, early bets are poised to generate some of the biggest paper gains in venture capital history.

item.title: Nearly 7 million student loan borrowers remain in defunct Biden-era payment plan: Trump official
item.description: Millions of student loan borrowers who've lingered in the SAVE plan are at risk of getting billed unaffordable payments and eventually falling into default.

item.title: Honeywell CEO says AI will 'redefine automation' as labor shortages mount
item.description: Honeywell CEO Vimal Kapur said AI is poised to "redefine automation" by helping companies turn operational data into actionable insights.

item.title: Trump picks former SEC Chairman Jay Clayton as national intelligence director
item.description: Trump's announcement came after House Democrats' objections to his pick of Bill Pulte as acting chief ensured that a key national security tool expires Friday.

item.title: Insurance stocks — especially one name — are about to break out, charts show
item.description: Jay Woods of Freedom Capital Markets says insurance stocks have been trending sideways for years but charts show that is changing.

item.title: Coinbase launches tool to let AI agents manage trading and payments
item.description: Coinbase is betting that AI agents will become the primary interface for people's financial activity.

item.title: Eaton moves one step closer to becoming a cleaner bet on the AI boom
item.description: Auto parts manufacturer Dana has agreed to combine with Eaton's Mobility business in a deal that values the unit at $5.1 billion.

item.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona to support its AI coding assistant, Codex
item.description: Ona's technology will allow OpenAI's coding assistant, Codex, to take on longer-running tasks, OpenAI said.

item.title: Mortgage rates will likely stay high amid the Iran war, experts say. Here’s how to get the best deal anyway
item.description: The Iran war has led to a rise in housing costs. Here's how you can get a lower-than-average rate.

item.title: BTS-mania poised to boost South Korea's economy well into the future
item.description: BTS-mania, with all the fan spending and travel, is poised to boost South Korea's economy well into the future

item.title: Elections advertising spend for 2026 expected to reach record high, outpacing presidential years
item.description: High-profile 2026 midterm races in California, Texas and other key states are driving higher spend earlier in the cycle, AdImpact found.

item.title: Luxury stocks spike on proposed U.S.-Iran peace deal; LVMH up 5%
item.description: Luxury stocks have been hard hit by the Iran war, as the Middle East had been a fast-growing market for the otherwise largely muted sector.

item.title: Oil tanker CEO sees Hormuz ship traffic quickly increasing if U.S. and Iran reach a deal
item.description: Many shipowners are just waiting for the threat assessment to be downgraded before crossing Hormuz, Frontline CEO Lars Barstad said.

item.title: Why Nokia is betting on AI-powered networks
item.description: Nokia helped define the mobile era. Now it's trying to shape what comes next. As artificial intelligence transforms how networks are built and managed, the Finnish telecom giant is betting on AI-driven infrastructure, 6G and a more software-centric future.

item.title: A Chinese start-up's unfolding dilemma exposes cracks in Beijing's tech funding machine
item.description: While the U.S. channels support to tech winners indirectly via incentives, Chinese governments at every level take direct equity stakes.

item.title: Trump administration appeals ruling blocking $100,000 H-1B fee
item.description: The appeal follows a ruling that President Donald Trump exceeded his authority by imposing a $100,000 H-1B visa application fee without approval from Congress.

item.title: Oracle shares tumble 11% on increased capital raise, cash concerns
item.description: Oracle beat on earnings and revenue, but negative free cash flow and the company's plan to raise more capital is weighing on the stock.
